title: Bright
description: Bright!! The only light mod that you'll ever need! Bright Includes 5 unique lighting blocks to light up your world!
body:
[![requires_framework](https://api.lpsmods.dev/data/framework.png)](https://mrcrayfish.com/mods/framework)

Bright!! The only light mod that you'll ever need! Bright Includes 5 unique lighting blocks to light up your world, not to mention all 5 lightning blocks also have their different variants (all 16 colors, metals)

## Loaders
- [Bedrock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/bright)
- **Fabric**
- **Forge**
- **NeoForge**

## How to use
To make the light emit light you must power the light.

## Block List
- Light Bulbs (16 colors)
- Floor Lights (16 colors)
- Light Fixture (16 colors)
- Ceiling Light (16 colors)
- Candle Stick (17 colors in 5 metals)

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.
